title: Tomato Galette
subtitle: Buttery pastry with mustard, herbs, and summer tomatoes
instructions: Roll the pastry onto a lined tray.
Spread mustard over the center, leaving a border.
Top with cheese, sliced tomatoes, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Fold the edges inward and bake until golden.
notes: Let it cool for 10 minutes before slicing for cleaner pieces.
